snippets.snippet: They have swimming pool also large garden by the sea
Breakfast place view directly to sunrise

address.address1: Jl. Raya Desa Anoi Itam, Kecamatan Sukaraja, Pulau Weh

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.0/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Children 0-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is really beautiful, so I really want to visit again. A note for the place, it should remain tidy and clean, so that the atmosphere stays beautiful to see. Other facilities should always be maintained.
comments.originalComment: tempatnya baguussss kali sehingga saya sangat ingin berkunjung kesana kembali. note untuk tempat maunya tetap dirapikan dan dibersihkan. agar suasanyanya tetaap cantik untuk dilihat. prasarana lainnya harus terus lakukan pemeliharaan selalu.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Wor waren die einzigen Gäste in dem Hotel .
Der Hausmeister schlief die meiste Zeit vom Tag und kam nur auf Zuruf.Frühstück war mangelhaft , Butter und Milch nicht vorhanden , Obst auf Nachfrage.
comments.reviewPositives: Gute Lage und ein schöner Ausblick übers Meer .
comments.reviewTitle: Für 30 Euro die Nacht zu teuer aber hat als eines von 2 Hotels auf der Insel einen Pool

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I stayed at this resort and found that its location is quite good, with a beautiful view directly facing the open sea and easy access to the airport, comfortable parking, and clean bathrooms. However, I was a bit disappointed with the level of staff friendliness that could be improved, and the swimming pool is a bit shallow for adults. Overall, this resort provides an adequate experience for the price.
comments.originalComment: Saya menginap di resor ini dan menemukan bahwa lokasinya cukup bagus, view sangat indah berhadapan langsung ke laut lepas dan mudah diakses ke bandara, parkir yg nyaman dan kamar mandi yg bersih. Namun saya sedikit kecewa dengan tingkat keramahan staf yg bisa ditingkatkan, kolam renangnya sedikit dangkal untuk ukuran orang dewasa. secara keseluruhan resor ini memberikan pengalaman yg memadai dengan harga yang sesuai

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Es gibt nichts zu Essen Abends und kein Internet 👎
comments.reviewPositives:
Eigentlich eine sehr schöne Anlage, vieles aber heruntergekommen!
Frühstück war wirklich klasse👍☕🍳🍞

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Rooms are clean, Chinese  owner Mr Rusy is there to make sure house keeping is well planned and clean,  property cleaning level is very satisfying  

Wonderful see view 
Let the sea set you free.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hotel was ok, room was a little dark as it only had one small window but comfortable enough and ac worked well. The pool
Is lovely to swim in and relax with an excellent view across the sea. 
You need to drive a car or motorbike as it is quite remote and not near very much within walking distance. The food is ok.
comments.reviewTitle: Excellent pool and gardens but quite remote

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Terrible experience, no wifi -stated wifi on bookings.com, no booking reference for payment, no one could communicate or wanted to, no food, restaurant closed and too far out of town or next shops to get anything.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The pros:  decent room, comfy mattress and quality linens.  Great a.c, hot water and wifi.  The pool is kept clean.  The sunrise is the highlight.

Downside, if you come by taxi, you best negotiate that driver to come back and agree to a price that's worth it for him. 

We didn't do that, at check out the staff on hand could not seem to confirm a taxi was coming.  Thankfully we had a drivers number and he showed, but it was stressful.

Also there's nothing around other than the in-house restaurant, and it's both higher priced than all othervrestraunts we visited and serves rather tiny portions.  I'm ok with either given that it's a monopoly, but I'd like good portions to make up for high price, how much is rice anyways?  And seafood fried rice where the only sea food is 4 tiny squid slices declaratively placed on top....  for these reasons, this is the one hotel out of 4 that we strayed at in Pulau Weh that I'd not return too.
